title: EPIC: Visual Interface & Rick Aesthetic System
description: Implement the complete visual design system including dark theme, portal green accents, glassmorphism effects, star field background, and all animations. This is what separates us from those primitive Earth IDEs. We're building something that looks like it came from Dimension C-137's finest labs.
acceptance_criteria: Dark theme with portal green (#39ff14) accents applied globally
Glassmorphism cards with glow effects render smoothly at 60fps
Animated star field background runs without performance degradation
Portal swirl animations trigger on agent spawn events
Meeseeks cyan (#5bcefa), Rick blue (#a8d8ea), and Morty yellow (#f0e14a) colors integrated into component library
